case_title: DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES VS MONTANA WENDY

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.00 FILED BY DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT MONTANA WENDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
